import React, { useState, useContext } from 'react'; import { AppContext } from '../App'; import { Colaborador } from '../types'; const Colaboradores: React.FC = () => { const { colaboradores, setColaboradores, empresaId, showConfirm } = useContext(AppContext); // ... rest of the component ... const handleDelete = (id: number) => { const colab = colaboradores.find(c => c.id === id); if (!colab) return; showConfirm({ title: 'Remover Colaborador', text: `Tem a certeza que deseja eliminar o colaborador "${colab.nome}"? Esta acção removerá todos os registros associados.`, onConfirm: () => { setColaboradores(colaboradores.filter(c => c.id !== id)); } }); }; return (

setFormData({...formData, email: e.target.value})} className="w-full px-4 py-2.5 bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-lg outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary font-bold" />
setFormData({...formData, iban: e.target.value})} className="w-full px-4 py-2.5 bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-lg outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary font-black text-primary font-mono text-sm" />
setFormData({...formData, nif: e.target.value})} className="w-full px-4 py-2.5 bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-lg outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary font-bold" />
setFormData({...formData, cargo: e.target.value})} className="w-full px-4 py-2.5 bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-lg outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary font-bold" />
setFormData({...formData, salarioBase: Number(e.target.value.replace(/\D/g, ''))})} className="w-full px-4 py-2.5 bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-lg outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary font-black text-lg" />
)}
); }; export default Colaboradores;
